Acme Manufacturing Corporation
Q3 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
October 25, 2023

OPERATOR: Good morning. Welcome to the Acme Manufacturing Third Quarter 2023 Earnings Call.

JAMES CARTER (CEO): Good morning and thank you for joining us. We had a solid third quarter with revenue growth of 6% year over year driven by strong demand in our industrial segment.

Our engineering team completed the rollout of our new precision casting line, which improves yield rates and reduces material waste. Customer satisfaction scores remain at an all-time high, reflecting the quality of our products and the dedication of our workforce.

LINDA PARK (CFO): Gross margin expanded by 80 basis points as we benefited from lower raw material costs and improved manufacturing efficiency. We continue to invest in our employees, with average hourly wages increasing 4.2% this year as part of our commitment to competitive compensation. Total headcount increased by 340 positions to support growing demand in our aerospace division.

Capital expenditure for the quarter was $48 million, primarily for equipment upgrades at our Ohio and Texas facilities. We remain on track with our five-year capacity expansion plan.

JAMES CARTER: Looking ahead, we see continued healthy demand from our key end markets. Our backlog grew to a record $1.4 billion, giving us strong visibility into 2024. We are investing in new product development and expanding our sales team to capture share in the medical device components market.

Environmental stewardship remains a priority. We reduced Scope 1 emissions by 12% this year through process improvements and renewable energy procurement. Our target is carbon neutrality by 2035.

ANALYST: Can you comment on your pricing strategy for next year?

JAMES CARTER: We expect modest price increases in the low single digits, consistent with our long-term track record of sharing productivity gains with customers rather than taking outsized price increases. We believe this approach sustains long-term customer relationships.

OPERATOR: Thank you. This concludes the Acme Manufacturing Q3 2023 Earnings Call.
